author: y4rr
content:
Phase 1E complete. Added ferrotorch-core/src/stride_tricks.rs (~440 LOC) with:

- Tensor::as_strided(size, stride, storage_offset) — zero-copy view via existing stride_view; bounds validated, overlap allowed (matching torch). Works on every device (CPU, CUDA, XPU, Meta) because it is pure metadata.
- Tensor::as_strided_copy(...) — materialises the view; CPU walks multi-index, CUDA dispatches to existing GpuBackend::strided_copy_f32/f64. No host bounce on CUDA.
- Tensor::as_strided_scatter(src, ...) — inverse op; CPU implementation. CUDA returns NotImplementedOnCuda (tracked in #574).
- AsStridedBackward grad_fn wires autograd: gradient is grad_output scattered into a zeros tensor of input shape via as_strided_scatter. Matches torch's AsStridedBackward0.
- Free-function variants as_strided/as_strided_copy/as_strided_scatter re-exported from ferrotorch-core::lib.

Also added pub fn storage_len() and pub fn storage() on Tensor (used by stride_tricks for bounds checks and CUDA dispatch — symmetric with the existing storage_offset accessor).

Added ferray-stride-tricks = 0.3 as a workspace dep. Did NOT directly call ferray-stride-tricks::as_strided because (1) ferray's variant takes &[usize] strides (no negative), torch needs &[isize], and (2) zero-copy ferrotorch views need stride_view at the Tensor layer rather than ferray's borrowed ArrayView.

Tests: 17 new in stride_tricks::tests covering reshape-via-as_strided, sliding window (overlapping), negative stride reverse, zero stride broadcast, bounds rejection (out of range, negative reach, length mismatch, zero-size dim), zero-copy storage sharing, as_strided_copy correctness, as_strided_scatter writes/preserves/2D-into-1D, autograd through as_strided (non-overlap and overlap last-write-wins).

GPU discipline verification:
- as_strided is metadata-only — view storage shares the same Arc<TensorStorage>, no new allocation, no transfer
- as_strided_copy on CUDA goes through gpu_backend().strided_copy_f32/f64 (real GPU kernel, no .to(Cpu) anywhere)
- as_strided_scatter on CUDA explicitly returns NotImplementedOnCuda — no silent fallback
- Forbidden patterns grep'd clean: no .to(Device::Cpu) inside compute fns, no tensor_to_cpu/cpu_to_gpu sandwich

Workspace test count: 4475 passed, 0 failed, 99 ignored (was 4458 before; +17 stride_tricks tests). Closes #568. Follow-up: #574 for GPU scatter kernel.
